record.field: Securing integrated production lines, heavy industrial equipment, and spare parts for factories with complete technical coordination to match required specifications.
Meeting the needs of residential and commercial real estate projects for finishing materials, ceramics, lighting, sanitary ware, and decorations at competitive prices.
Assisting traders and startups in importing consumer goods and spare parts in bulk, with support for customization options and private labeling (OEM / ODM).
Fulfilling limited orders through consolidation services and Less-than-Container-Load (LCL) solutions to reduce costs for startups and individual projects.
You send us your product details, technical specifications, and estimated budget.
We contact suitable factories, present available options, and provide initial cost estimates.
We monitor sample manufacturing and conduct on-site technical inspection to ensure goods meet standards.
We coordinate shipment of goods and handle necessary customs paperwork for smooth delivery.
Is Importing from China Still Profitable? A Realistic Analysis and New Challenges

With global economic changes and evolving trade laws, many entrepreneurs are questioning the viability of importing from China. We present a realistic analysis of market opportunities and how import has shifted to organized smart import strategies.
Your Comprehensive Guide to Participating in the Canton Fair

The Canton Fair in Guangzhou is the world's largest commercial gathering for those seeking direct suppliers. This guide details the fair's schedule, phases, and practical tips for negotiating with exhibitors.
Avoiding Customs Detention: Key Documents and Certificates Required
Shipments often face customs obstacles due to missing documents. We detail the basic requirements such as Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Bill of Lading, and importance of conformity certificates.
The Safety Protocol: Ensuring Goods Match Specifications Before Leaving China
Why not rely entirely on factory promises? This article explains how to implement field Pre-Shipment Inspection protocols and container loading supervision standards.
